tool.name: GitHub Copilot
tool.description: Coding assistant platform delivered through IDE plugins with individual, business, and enterprise tiers.
tool.logoNotes: Official Copilot icon asset from the GitHub brand toolkit (`GitHub_Logos.zip` -> `Copilot_Icon_Black.svg`). GitHub changed standalone Copilot logo treatments in 2025, but this icon remains in the official pack and is used here as the compact service mark.
tool.practitionerNote: Safe default for enterprises standardising AI coding help broadly, especially when GitHub, VS Code, and policy controls already sit in the delivery path.

dataResidency.detail: EU data residency on GitHub Enterprise Cloud (US/EU only, surcharge); Business/Individual default US.

deployment.detail: SaaS via IDE plugins; no self-hosted/on-prem option.

auditLogging.detail: Enterprise audit logs cover seat/access/policy and Copilot interactions; audit-log API.

soc2.detail: GitHub SOC 2 Type II; Copilot in scope.

iso42001.detail: GitHub Copilot listed in Microsoft ISO/IEC 42001:2023 scope.

euAiAct.detail: Assessed limited-risk by product category; no published vendor EU AI Act conformity assessment.
